stemHtml: Which of the following is correct regarding the compass swing procedure?

options.a: Deviation noted after the swing procedure is noted on the compass deviation card and placed in the tech log.
options.b: Error remaining and noted after swing procedure is noted on the compass deviation card and placed near the compass.
options.c: Deviation compensation is noted before the compass swing procedure.
options.d: Residual deviation is noted before the compass swing procedure.
